page_intro: Customize the wording and styling of every email the platform sends. Defaults ship with the product; your overrides apply only to your coop.
subject: Subject
body_text_help: Used by mail clients that don't render HTML.
variables_help: Click into a field, then click a variable to insert it.
preview_hint: Click 'Refresh preview' to render with sample data.
default_reference_help: Read-only reference of the shipped default for this template, in your tenant language. Use 'Reset to default' to revert your customization to this content.

description.accounts_invitation: Sent when an admin invites a new person to set a password.
description.accounts_password_reset: Sent when someone clicks 'Forgot your password?'.
description.accounts_application_received: Automatic acknowledgement after the public join form is submitted.
description.accounts_application_approved: Sent after the office confirms an open application.
description.accounts_application_rejected: Sent when the office cannot accept an application.
description.accounts_welcome_user: Sent to any new user account as soon as it is activated (e.g. after accepting an invitation). Applies to every account — member, office, admin — not just members.
description.commissioning_trial_converted: Sent as soon as a trial member acquires their first cooperative share and thereby becomes a GenG member.
description.commissioning_member_cancelled: Sent after the office records a withdrawal from the cooperative (GenG §65 termination). Confirms the date of withdrawal and the (former) member number for the record.
description.commissioning_offer: Sent to resellers as soon as a new order form is released.
description.commissioning_invoice: Sent with the monthly/weekly invoice PDF to resellers.
description.commissioning_delivery_note: Sent manually by the office to resellers when the delivery note PDF is wanted upfront or for reconciliation. The printed delivery note ships with the goods inside the crate — the email is optional and triggered per order line from DeliveryNotes.tsx.
description.commissioning_invoice_reminder: Friendly / second / final reminder for overdue invoices.
description.gdpr_deletion_confirm: Sent after someone requests their data be deleted. Contains the 24-hour confirmation link that actually triggers the deletion.
description.gdpr_deletion_approved: Sent after the office approves the deletion request and the anonymization has been executed.
description.gdpr_deletion_rejected: Sent when the office rejects the deletion request — e.g. due to open legal obligations. Contains the reason given by the office.
description.tenants_smtp_test: Sent on 'Send test' from the email configuration (Settings → SMTP). The content is only a confirmation that the SMTP connection works. Edits apply only to your own test emails — it appears nowhere else.
